skills.name: find-psychologist
skills.description: Search TerapiRehberi's directory of licensed psychologists and therapists in Konya, Turkey — filterable by district and specialty.

skills.name: ask-question
skills.description: Submit an anonymous psychology question to TerapiRehberi's expert Q&A feed via POST /api/soru-sor.

skills.name: register-expert
skills.description: Submit a listing application for a licensed psychologist or therapist to appear on TerapiRehberi's Konya directory via POST /api/basvuru.
